title: Equity by Design: Building AI That Works for Everyone
abstract: AI systems reflect the priorities of the people who build them. This keynote challenges audiences to consider who benefits and who gets left behind — and gives them a practical framework for building AI that is both high-performing and genuinely equitable.
objectives: See how design decisions encode who AI systems serve
Evaluate AI products through an access-and-equity lens
Leave with a framework for building high-performing, equitable AI
takeaways: An equity-by-design review framework for AI products
Case studies from scholarship and pipeline programs that widened access
Practical questions to ask before an AI system ships
